name: Redemption Bank
description_short: Community bank based in Holladay City operating since 1974, offering FDIC-insured deposits and personalized banking with mobile, online, and in-person services.
description_long:
Redemption Bank is a community bank headquartered in Holladay City that has operated since 1974. The bank positions itself as an alternative to large national banks, emphasizing personal relationships and direct customer support over automated systems. As an FDIC-insured institution, customer deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to FDIC limits.

The bank offers core banking services including online banking, mobile banking, bill pay, and construction financing. Their online and mobile platforms are described as easy, convenient, and secure. Construction loans are highlighted as a specialty service for customers building homes. The bank maintains physical locations and phone support for customers who prefer traditional banking channels.

Redemption Bank differentiates itself by emphasizing customer service quality and community focus. They explicitly contrast their approach with large national banks, claiming to provide closer relationships, responsive support without hold music or automated systems, and willingness to incorporate customer feedback into service improvements. The bank serves customers across multiple channels: online, mobile, phone, and in-person.

The bank operates as a traditional community bank with standard FDIC protections. However, the website provides limited detail on specific product offerings, rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond service approach. No information is provided about checking accounts, savings rates, CD offerings, credit products, or whether they serve as a full-service bank. The website content suggests a smaller regional institution but does not specify asset size, branch count, or geographic service area beyond Holladay City. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Username and password management for online banking
pros: FDIC-insured deposits protected up to FDIC limits with no risk of loss
Mobile banking platform described as easy, convenient, and secure
Personalized customer service with direct support (no hold music or automated systems)
Specialized construction loan financing for home builders
Long operational history since 1974 demonstrating stability
Multi-channel access: online, mobile, phone, and in-person banking
Community-focused bank that incorporates customer feedback into service improvements
cons: Limited geographic presence (Holladay City location mentioned, but service area unclear)
Minimal detail on specific products, rates, or fees available on website
No information about checking/savings account features or CD offerings
Small regional bank may lack some services offered by larger institutions
Website does not clarify full range of personal banking products or credit services

contact.address: 2020 E Murray Holladay Road, Salt Lake City, UT 84117

best_for: Customers building or financing home construction projects
Community bank customers seeking personalized service over automated support
Local Holladay City residents seeking FDIC-insured deposits
Customers preferring relationship banking over large national bank services
diagnosis: Redemption Bank is best for customers in the Holladay City area seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personalized service, particularly those financing home construction. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal detail on specific account types, rates, fees, or the full range of services offered, making detailed product comparison difficult.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 2020 E Murray Holladay Road, Salt Lake City, UT 84117
